scripts.benchmark:load-smoke:draw-duel: pnpm --filter @ai-arcade/shared build && pnpm --filter realtime-server exec tsx src/load-smoke.ts --game=draw-duel --clients=120 --rooms=1
scripts.benchmark:load-smoke:real-or-ai: pnpm --filter @ai-arcade/shared build && pnpm --filter realtime-server exec tsx src/load-smoke.ts --game=real-or-ai --clients=120 --rooms=1
scripts.benchmark:public-beta: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm e2e && pnpm e2e:serial
